WO-IMPL-INFRA-RELIABILITY.title: Infrastructure & Persistence Reliability
WO-IMPL-INFRA-RELIABILITY.instruction_raw: Implement the Infrastructure & Persistence reliability spec to resolve high-priority technical debts (Checkpointing and Lifecycle Suture).

wo-infra-reliability.title: [Wave 5] Infrastructure & Persistence Reliability Checkpointing
wo-infra-reliability.instruction_raw: Follow MISSION_spec_infra_reliability.md to implement periodic SQLite checkpoints and hardened LifecycleManager coordination. Ensure zero-loss simulation persistency.

wo-mock-leak-repair.title: [Wave 5] Resolve MagicMock Leaks in Planners
wo-mock-leak-repair.instruction_raw: Fix the testing suite leaks caused by passing MagicMock objects instead of real DTOs to the Vectorized Planners and Stability Engine. Enforce strict DTO dataclass usage in test setups.
